---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an SDK method, a service endpoint, or a flow change
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What an app cannot do today, from the integrator's side.

## Proposed change

The new method on `createSeal`, the new service behavior, or the change to a flow. Note
whether it touches the wire format or a privacy property.

## Privacy and trust

- Does it keep keys in the caller's process
- Does it keep the relayer un-drainable and the indexer scan-key-free
- Does it need a matching change in `jat-program` or `jat-circuits`
